prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次分别为5332→4489→6442→6269→7369，整体呈后移趋势，近3年累计后移约2880名；2025年基准位次约7369名，较2024年上升约11 00名，后移加速；该校在贵州省理科/物理类招生计划2021年38人、2022年38人、2023年34人、2024年33人、2025年36人；2026年计划大幅扩至98人，较2 025年扩招约172%，为近年最大幅度扩招，将显著拉低录取位次。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜2026年第26名，近年排名稳定在24–27 名区间，属全国顶尖综合性大学；2026年高考周期声誉评价为明显负面，主要涉及前卫校区浴池安全事件及学术不端舆情，可能对考生报考心理产生一定抑制作 用；抖音热度排名第40（较热），短视频曝光量中等；2025年投档异常信号显示江苏物理类法学暴跌、黑龙江临床组下降，反映部分省份热度波动；第五轮学科 评估中A-及以上学科15个，包括考古学A+、马克思主义理论A+、法学A、数学A、化学A、物理学A、机械工程A、计算机科学与技术A-等，学科实力雄厚，对高分考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、临床医学等专业社会热度高热/推荐，与该校优势学科高度匹配；土木建筑、生化环材等明显劝退；贵州省2026年高考总人 数约299000人（物理类估算约208400人），较2025年物理类207171人微增约0.6%，竞争略有加剧；吉林大学位于吉林省长 春市，距贵州省较远；该校在贵州省招生占比约1.5%（2025年），属跨省招生，地域偏好对贵州考生报考意愿影响中性偏弱。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次7369名、2026 年招生计划大幅扩招172%（为近年最大扩招）、声誉负面舆情、考生总数微增及优势学科吸引力等因素：扩招是位次后移的最主要驱动力；声誉负面和考生数微增对位次有进一步后移作用，但优势学科和学校层次对高分考生仍有吸引力，部分抵消后移幅度。预测2026年理科/物理类最低位次约14783 名，区间14283–15283名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were 5332 → 4489 → 6442 → 6269 → 7369, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2880 positions in the last 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 7369, an increase of about 1100 positions compared to 2024, indicating accelerated backward movement; the enrollment plan for Jilin University in Guizhou Province for Science/Physics Category was 38 in 2021, 38 in 2022, 34 in 2023, 33 in 2024, and 36 in 2025; the 2026 plan significantly expands to 98, an increase of about 172% compared to 2025, the largest expansion in recent years, which will significantly lower admission rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 26th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, with stable rankings in the 24–27 range in recent years, belonging to the top comprehensive universities in China; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is clearly negative, mainly involving the Qianwei campus bathhouse safety incident and academic misconduct public opinion, which may have a certain inhibitory effect on candidates' application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking is 40th (relatively hot), with medium short video exposure; abnormal signals in 2025 admission show a sharp drop in law in Jiangsu Physics Category and a decline in the clinical group in Heilongjiang, reflecting fluctuations in popularity in some provinces; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 15 disciplines rated A- or above, including Archaeology A+, Marxist Theory A+, Law A, Mathematics A, Chemistry A, Physics A, Mechanical Engineering A, Computer Science and Technology A-, etc., with strong disciplinary strength, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Clinical Medicine, etc., are highly popular/recommended in society, highly matching the university's advantageous disciplines; Civil Engineering, Architecture, Biology, Chemistry, Environment, Materials, etc., are clearly discouraged; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Guizhou Province is about 299,000 (estimated Physics Category about 208,400), a slight increase of about 0.6% compared to the 2025 Physics Category of 207,171, with slightly intensified competition; Jilin University is located in Changchun City, Jilin Province, relatively far from Guizhou Province; the university's enrollment proportion in Guizhou Province is about 1.5% (2025), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with regional preference having a neutral to weak impact on Guizhou candidates' willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 7369, the 2026 enrollment plan's significant expansion of 172% (the largest expansion in recent years), negative reputation public opinion, a slight increase in the number of candidates, and the attractiveness of advantageous disciplines: expansion is the main driver of ranking backward movement; negative reputation and the slight increase in candidates further push the ranking backward, but advantageous disciplines and school level still attract high-scoring candidates, partially offsetting the backward movement. Predict the minimum ranking for the 2026 Science/Physics Category to be about 14783, with a range of 14283–15283.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Jilin University significantly expands enrollment in Guizhou Physics Category, with a predicted ranking range of 14283–15283, a notable backward shift compared to 2025. Candidates near the upper limit of the range (about 15000 and above) are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice and Tier 3 as a safety; candidates near the lower limit of the range (about 14200) can aim for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Computer Science and Technology, Automation, and Clinical Medicine. After the expansion, admission opportunities increase; candidates are advised to choose reasonably based on their own rankings.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were 537→608→1597→1305→1240, with significant fluctuations; in 2023, it sharply dropped to 1597, then rebounded to 1305 and 1240 in 2024–2025, showing a slight upward trend in recent two years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 1240; the enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Guizhou Province was 9 in 2021, 9 in 2022, 10 in 2023, 11 in 2024, and 12 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 15, a 25% increase from 2025, with continuous small expansions over multiple years, slightly increasing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 26th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, belonging to the top-tier comprehensive universities in China, with equally outstanding liberal arts strength; the reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is significantly negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents and academic misconduct controversies, which may have a certain inhibitory effect on candidates' application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking is 40th (relatively hot), with medium short video exposure; Law A, Marxist Theory A+, Archaeology A+, Philosophy A-, Political Science A-, etc., with strong liberal arts advantageous disciplines, strongly attracting high-scoring liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Jilin University is located in Changchun City, Jilin Province, far from Guizhou Province; its enrollment proportion in liberal arts in Guizhou is extremely small (about 0.015%), with neutral impact on Guizhou liberal arts candidates' willingness to apply; Law is socially recommended (relatively hot), while Teacher Training/Education is differentiated and wait-and-see; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Guizhou college entrance examination is approximately 299,000 (history category estimated at about 90,600), a slight increase of about 0.6% from 90,087 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1240, the 2026 enrollment plan expansion of 25%, negative reputation public opinion, slight increase in total candidates, and the attractiveness of advantageous disciplines such as Law: expansion is the main driver for ranking decline, but the continuous small expansions over multiple years have been gradually absorbed by the market; advantageous disciplines like Law A strongly attract high-scoring liberal arts candidates, partially offsetting the ranking decline caused by expansion; negative reputation has a certain inhibitory effect on application enthusiasm. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category in 2026 will be approximately 1446, with a range of 1301–1591.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Jilin University will slightly expand enrollment in the History category in Guizhou, with a predicted ranking range of 1301–1591. Candidates near the upper limit of the range (approximately above 1550) are advised to focus on Tier 2 Economics Class and Ideological and Political Education as main choices; candidates near the lower limit of the range (approximately 1300) can prioritize Tier 1 Law (A-level discipline) and Humanities Experimental Class. As Jilin University's flagship liberal arts major, Law continues to have high application enthusiasm, and high-scoring candidates are recommended to consider it first.
